checks.name: npm run verify
checks.notes: This command is expected to pass before snapshot generation.

checks.name: npm run test:smoke:registry
checks.notes: Registry smoke was not run in this context.

checks.name: Pulse and Shield release surface
checks.notes: Benchmark defaults now track Pulse signal freshness and Shield audit persistence.

benchmarkSets.name: Swee Pulse and Shield release baseline
limitations: Live source availability depends on upstream public agencies and configured credentials.
Benchmark defaults are release gates, not a public uptime claim.

transportReliability.focus: LTA transport reliability source coverage for civic-hacker demos.

sourceChecks.surface: Swee Pulse mobility signal + source health
sourceChecks.freshnessEvidence: LTA does not provide a row timestamp; Swee Pulse reports observedAt and preserves the missing upstream timestamp as a confidence limit.

sourceChecks.surface: Swee Pulse mobility signal + source health
sourceChecks.coverage: Network-wide train service alerts and operator messages.
sourceChecks.freshnessEvidence: Operator message createdDate is used when present; otherwise freshness is surfaced as unknown.

sourceChecks.surface: Swee Pulse mobility signal + source health
sourceChecks.coverage: Network-wide road-work events with start/end timing.
sourceChecks.freshnessEvidence: Event start/end timing is retained as upstream timing context; unknown timing remains visible in source health.

sourceChecks.surface: Swee Pulse mobility signal + source health
sourceChecks.coverage: Network-wide road-opening events with start/end timing.
sourceChecks.freshnessEvidence: Event start/end timing is retained as upstream timing context; unknown timing remains visible in source health.

sourceChecks.coverage: Traffic camera image references and camera timestamps.
sourceChecks.freshnessEvidence: Camera timestamps drive freshness where data.gov.sg returns them.

sourceChecks.coverage: Stop-level bus arrival timings when exact bus stop inputs are supplied.
sourceChecks.freshnessEvidence: Arrival estimates remain direct-adapter evidence and are not collapsed into the default network-wide Pulse snapshot.

sourceChecks.coverage: Live carpark lot availability for filtered or capped queries.
sourceChecks.freshnessEvidence: Adapter responses expose observedAt metadata; Swee Pulse does not currently score carpark availability as a city disruption signal.

sourceChecks.coverage: Available taxi coordinates for bounded queries.
sourceChecks.freshnessEvidence: Adapter responses expose observedAt metadata; Swee Pulse does not currently infer transport safety or availability claims from taxi positions.

limits: This benchmark reports source coverage and evidence handling, not official service status.
Credentialed LTA checks require SG_API_LTA_KEY or a local keystore entry.
Missing upstream timestamps are reported as limits instead of being filled with synthetic freshness.

workflows.evidence: build + Pulse contract tests + public smoke checks
NEA adapter tests + Pulse weather aggregation checks
LTA adapter tests + Pulse mobility aggregation checks
Pulse mobility source-health checks + LTA transport adapter tests
Shield audit-store tests + gateway enforcement checks

notes: Pulse summarizes source-backed city signals and surfaces freshness gaps explicitly.
Weather signals remain deterministic and retain NEA provenance.
Credential-gated LTA sources are tracked as explicit gaps when unavailable.
Transport reliability proof covers incidents, train alerts, road events, and traffic camera freshness before broader civic expansion.
Shield writes sanitized replay metadata for every governed call.

limits: This page is generated from local or CI benchmark evidence; it is not an SLA.
Skipped smoke checks are reported separately and do not count as failures.
Freshness completeness measures whether outputs expose freshness metadata, not whether upstream data is intrinsically complete.
